meaning: n.锡塔尔琴(印度的一种大弦弹拨乐器)
examples: So — but he is the venerable sitar player.
Indian sitar music works best, followed by classical music.
Musical instruments include the Sarangi, Sitar, Tabla, Tambora, and Tanpura.
Indian sitar maestro Ravi Shankar has died in a hospital in the US, aged 92.
It's also aggressively Eastern in feel lots of incense, sitar music and chanting, accompanied by a droning harmonium.
